steps.title: Convert the percent increase
steps.content:
An $18.75\%$ increase means multiplying the original number by:
$$1+0.1875=1.1875$$

steps.title: Work backward from June
steps.content:
Let $x$ be the number of dragonflies on May $1$. Then:
$$1.1875x=133$$
$$x=\frac{133}{1.1875}=112$$
This is the original count before the increase. The answer is D.
